1/3

Aunque las palabras que te vas a encontrar como objetivo del juego están en inglés, tienes la opción de iniciar con las explicaciones en español y gradualmente cambiar al inglés.

Choose your language

-This game is about finding out the mysterious word. There are 3 categories:

  • - 4 letter words.
  • - 5 letter words.
  • - 6 letter words.

-You only have 5 opportunities to guess the correct word. There is only 1 word per category per day.

-The larger the number of letters, the more complicated the word could be. Yet, we encourage you to play the 3 categories daily!

-Either if you found out the word of the day or you lost, your reward is the translation, etymology and uses for the word, and a +1 in your score counter for the category you're playing in.

-As of right now this score is worth nothing more than showing off, but it may become useful in the future.

Close
